headline: Paramount Skydance Weighs Warner Deal Scale Against Debt And Oversight Risks
summary: Paramount Skydance (NasdaqGS:PSKY) is advancing its planned acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery toward a potential July 15 closing. S&P Global Ratings has announced a downgrade of Paramount’s credit profile, citing the large amount of new debt tied to financing the transaction. Democratic senators have urged the FCC to review foreign ownership stakes linked to entities in the Middle East and China, focusing on national security and editorial independence concerns. For you as an investor,...

headline: 1 S&P 500 Stock to Target This Week and 2 That Underwhelm
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is home to the biggest and most well-known companies in the market, making it a go-to index for investors seeking stability. But not all large-cap stocks are created equal - some are struggling with slowing growth, declining margins, or increased competition.

headline: Stephen Colbert returns to TV in appearance on local Michigan station
summary: A day after his last episode of “The Late Show” on CBS, Colbert found his way back to a television hosting gig for one night.
